title: Principal Investment Banker at Paytm Money

jsonLd.title: Principal Investment Banker at Paytm Money
jsonLd.description:
We at Paytm Money are looking for an experienced Investment Banker based out of Raipur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Paytm Money:
Paytm Money is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Paytm Money!
